comment.body:
> как с задачей, к примеру, справляется RU AdList То есть фильтр не просто удаляет лишние баннеры, а ещё и добавляет заполнитель вместо чёрного места, оставшегося от фоновой рекламы по бокам.
Правила из RU AdList

``` ! HDRezka ! домены: hdrezka.ag,hdrezka.buzz,hdrezka.city,hdrezka.club,hdrezka.co,hdrezka.in,hdrezka.ink,hdrezka.loan,hdrezka.me,hdrezka.name,hdrezka.rest,hdrezka.run,hdrezka.sh,hdrezka.today,hdrezka.tv,hdrezka.vip,hdrezka.website,hdrezka.win,hdrezkapez.org,hdrezkapzm.org,hdrezkawer.org,kinopub.me,rezka-ua.tv,rezka.ag,rezkery.com,rezkify.com ! ##.b-content__main > div[style][id]:not([class]):empty ! ##.b-post__mixedtext + div[style] ! ##.b-player a[href*="aHR0c"] ! ##.b-seriesupdate__block_list_item[data-url=""] hdrezka.*,rezka.*##body.has-brand .b-content__main .b-player a[href*="aHR0c"] hdrezka.*,rezka.*##body.has-brand .b-content__main > div[id]:not([class]):empty hdrezka.*,rezka.*##body.has-brand .b-content__main > div[style^="height: 250px; overflow: hidden;"] ! блокировки /point/?method=video_lin*&xl=$xmlhttprequest ://sta*rezka.*/i/def_$image ://sta*rezka.*/i/promo/ !||static.*ezka.*/templates/hdrezka/images/slava. ! скрытие, общие ##body.has-brand .b-content__main .b-player a[href*="aHR0c"] ##body.has-brand .b-content__main > div[id]:not([class]):empty ##body.has-brand .b-content__main > div[style^="height: 250px; overflow: hidden;"] ```

Это же относится и к доменам [hdrezka.ag](https://hdrezka.ag/) (оригинальный сайт), [hdrezka.me](https://hdrezka.me/), [rezka.ag](https://rezka.ag/), [hdrezka-home.tv](https://hdrezka-home.tv/) и другим зеркалам

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check);

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.youtube.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2F) ### Comment > For the past week, ever since Youtube launched their latest attack on adblockers, the AdGuard Extension for Chrome hasn't been working properly on Youtube. > > It works everywhere else & blocks ads effectively, but when I try to play a video on Youtube, the video refuses to play, or plays for a few seconds before it stops & a message appears saying "This content is unavailable, please try again later." > > Furthermore, Youtube doesn't say that it has detected my adblocker & the usual warning, no, it simply says that the content is unavailable. > > To be clear, this issue does not occur on my mobile's browser while using the AdGuard app, it only occurs on my chromebook while using the AdGuard extension. ### Screenshots

issue.title: www.bild.de

labels.name: A: By Design
labels.description: The issue cannot be resolved due to technical, ethic, or legal reasons

issue.body:
## Information

### Deutsch

Sehr geehrte Benutzerin, sehr geehrter Benutzer, aufgrund von Gesetzen ([z. B. die Gerichtsentscheidung in Karlsruhe, Deutschland im Jahre 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html)) ist es leider nicht möglich diese Paywall (Adblock-Erkennung) zu umgehen. Vielen Dank für Ihr Verständnis.

### English

Dear user, due to a court decision ([eg the court ruling in Karlsruhe, Germany in 2018](https://www.morgenpost.de/wirtschaft/article214069831/Karlsruhe-erlaubt-Werbeblocker.html) ) it is unfortunately not possible to bypass this paywall (adblock detection). Thank you for your understanding.

issue.title: vologda-oblast.ru
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Annoyance) [https://vologda-oblast.ru/ru/government/municipalities/atu/index.php?okato_15=19+256+884+001](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fvologda-oblast.ru%2Fru%2Fgovernment%2Fmunicipalities%2Fatu%2Findex.php%3Fokato_15%3D19%2B256%2B884%2B001) ### Comment > Здравствуйте. Последние пару месяцев АдГвард пропускает очень много окон, предупреждающих про куки. Очень-очень много. Такое ощущение, что он вообще их не отлавливает. На ноутбуке у меня также установлена Ваша программа, там фильтров поменьше подключено, но антикуки есть, и тоже пропускает слишком уж много сообщений. Похоже, что сайты научились обходить фильтры. > Успехов Вам. ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Trackers)
 [https://animo.sto.wiki](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fanimo.sto.wiki)
### Comment
> Visit https://stowiki.net and the reported URL (in issue creation tool) tracker will be called by JS on the page with tracking information.
> 
> Easiest way to repro is:
> * Visit any page
> * See a POST to https://animo.sto.wiki/api/send in network inspector
> * See that the request has analytics/tracker information in it
> 
> Everything should then be straightforward for you from there. Suggest you consider blocking any tracker found.

### Issue URL (Trackers)
 [https://animo.sto.wiki](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fanimo.sto.wiki)
### Comment
> Visit https://stowiki.net and the reported URL (in issue creation tool) tracker will be called by JS on the page with tracking information.
> 
> Easiest way to repro is:
> * Visit any page
> * See a POST to https://animo.sto.wiki/api/send in network inspector
> * See that the request has analytics/tracker information in it
> 
> Everything should then be straightforward for you from there. Suggest you consider blocking any tracker found.

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/978un4rlwkcg0g4s4gc80cgcokgs004iba4cc6ll9s.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

DNS setup: | Device or router settings

Browser: | Chrome

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_lChC6g7wY6k_RJkLhYwf-doyMVhN41KO4](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fplaylist%3Flist%3DOLAK5uy_lChC6g7wY6k_RJkLhYwf-doyMVhN41KO4) ### Comment > Update to https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/203236#issuecomment-3938768982 > > YouTube might partially turn back the clock to when I posted this: https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/203236#issuecomment-3926612327 > > The current state is: > > 1. From a Japan server, I do not encounter fake buffering of Type 1, and > > Videos from "BBC News" > > No fake buffering: 100% > > Some specific videos, most notably musics and music-related videos (like `https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_lChC6g7wY6k_RJkLhYwf-doyMVhN41KO4`) > > Fake buffering of Type 2: 30-40% > No fake buffering: 60-70% > > 2. From a South Korea server, the "this content isn't available" message disappears and videos can be played now. > What has not changed is that you experience "Type 1"-like buffering before a video starts, which is caused, as before, by a significant number of `player?prettyPrint=false` requests. > This may imply that YouTube has simply loosened its "Captcha net" and that it is still quite possible for videos to be blocked again. > > > I'll continue to monitor and report this chaotic situation > > ### Screenshots

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 4 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: Google Play: com.artplacer.kunstlageret
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.artplacer.kunstlageret&hl=en](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Dcom.artplacer.kunstlageret%26hl%3Den)
### Comment
> To whom it may concern,
> 
> We are experiencing an issue where AdGuard is blocking deep links used by our mobile application, preventing users from opening content directly inside the app.
> 
> These links are legitimate app deep links used to route users into our application and are essential for core functionality and user experience. However, when AdGuard is enabled, the links are blocked and fail to open correctly.
> 
> Example affected link:
> https://kunstlageret.app.link/nuTcGwJGuWb?token=1769093222
> 
> To replicate this, please download this app https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.artplacer.kunstlageret&hl=en
> 
> Then visit this website https://kunstlageret.com/maleri/nordic-stillness-2/ and try the AR visualizer. This should trigger the app on with the same artwork on display. However, if dns.adguard.com is set as active on private dns settings (android 16) the app hangs on the home screen, and the AR visualizer is not triggered as expected.
> 
> We kindly request that these links (and the corresponding domain/app-link infrastructure) be reviewed and whitelisted so that they function properly for users with AdGuard enabled.
> 
> Please let us know if you need any additional information or technical details to proceed.
> 
> Please send reply to `mz@artplacer.com` CC `julio.hernandez@banana-software.com`
> 
> Thank you very much for your help and support.
> 
> Best regards,
> Juan from ArtPlacer.com

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5hx7q38mc5c00o0wos4sks4cgo000gcp151w8996es.png?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/662sc55r650cwgcsw4wswgggso4888kol8ydmubsgg.png?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Device or router settings
DNS server: | AdGuard DNS Default server
System version: | `Android 16`
Browser: | any

issue.title: www.youtube.com

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# ATTENTION

> [!NOTE]  
> YouTube changes their detection scripts regularly. That means that sometime you can face the detection message.
> If all the following instructions do not work, please **email filters@adguard.com** or wait until any update is available. 

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use another adblocker in the same time because using another adblocker can delay/lags the YouTube loading (e.g., AdBlock Plus and AdBlock)[^1] OR interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!CAUTION] 
> Please do not use an userscript related to the bypassing YouTube detection message like [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing).
> Recently, YouTube anti-adblock script added infinite dummy advertisements to try to neutralize the userscript. ( [TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing#264](https://github.com/TheRealJoelmatic/RemoveAdblockThing/issues/264) )

> [!WARNING]
> Please check that there no another web browser extension that has adblocking feature is enabled on your web browser. It can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.

> [!IMPORTANT]  
> Saving memory feature of your web browser or sleep feature of your operating system can interfere AdGuard's filtering functionality.
> In this case, please re-enable AdGuard's filtering by toggling the protection toggle.
> Following the instructions can be needed.

### The instructions
1. Force to update the filters by clicking the reload button in AdGuard Browser Extension/AdGuard mobile or update tray menu in your system tray. [^2]
2. Reload the YouTube webpage without cache by pressing <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd> [^3].
3. Clear cache, cookies and site data of your web browser.
4. Re-open your web browser completely (checking your system monitor[^4] will be better).

[^1]: https://gitlab.com/adblockinc/ext/adblockplus/adblockplusui/-/issues/1576
[^2]: [AdGuard for Windows](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-windows/overview/#tray-menu); [AdGuard for Mac](https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-for-mac/overview/#updates-check); 
[^3]: On macOS, <kbd>Command</kbd> + <kbd>Shift</kbd> + <kbd>R</kbd>
[^4]: Task Manager on Windows, System Monitor on GNOME Shell, KDE System Guard on KDE Plasma or Activity Monitor on macOS. 


Previous issue https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/198973

comment.body:
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/203236#issuecomment-3940891060
> Some specific videos, most notably musics and music-related videos (like https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=OLAK5uy_lChC6g7wY6k_RJkLhYwf-doyMVhN41KO4)

Playlist is a bit different buffering-wise, but I can't reproduce with the latest filters (it doesn't mean your issue shouldn't exist).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
